events.title: Raft~ Camp & Craft Beer
events.description: Nothing pairs better than beer and rafting! This two-day experience seamlessly blends whitewater rafting with a thoughtfully curated craft beer experience. Put on in partnership with Crooked Lane Brewing, and guided by the owner and brewer, Teresa Psuty, you’ll savor tastings of diverse array of beers including our collab brew, River Daze Hazy IPA. After each day on the river, guests will enjoy learning about the brewing process, Crooked Lane Brewing’s featured beers, and cheers to the river experience. Each pour will be accompanied by engaging stories and expert pairings! From campfire sessions to riverside meals, the trip offers a flavorful journey that celebrates the craft of brewing in the heart of nature, making it perfect for beer connoisseurs and outdoor adventurers.Our 2-day, 1-night rafting trip starts by meeting in the morning at Crooked Lane Brewing in Auburn. After taking a shuttle to the put-in, the real fun begins as we take on a challenging 18-mile section of the Middle Fork American River on day one. After a thrilling start, we’ll ease back the pace so you can enjoy the beauty of the lush, forested canyon and hopefully spot some wildlife. We’ll spend our night together camped on a remote, riverside beach. The next day, we’ll get back on the river and test our mettle on several other Class III and Class IV rapids. At the end of the second day, we’ll shuttle back to our meet up point, Crooked Lane Brewing. From there you will have the opportunity to tour the brewery and see first hand the beer making process. Plus it’s a perfect spot to end – cheers with new friends, grab a 6-pack or growler of your favorite tasters, and relive the moments from the trip. The Middle Fork American River rafting is a challenging, advanced river with numerous Class IV rapids. It is fun and fast and one you will always remember!For more info: https://whitewatertours.com/white-water-rafting/middle-fork-american-river-craft-beer-2-day/ (Recurring: Does not Repeat)

events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

This band delivers the ultimate Lynyrd Skynyrd experience, authentically replicating the Southern rock legends’ iconic sound. Formed by a group of professional musicians with decades of experience, including stints with national acts like Lady Gaga, Three Dog Night, Keith Urban, Brad Paisley, and Good Charlotte, the 10-piece band brings the raw energy and spirit of Lynyrd Skynyrd’s music to life. With a repertoire spanning nearly six decades of timeless hits, Skynyrd Nation performs with passion, creating an electrifying atmosphere that’s impossible to resist. Their high-energy shows resonate with audiences, evoking the glory days of Southern rock and delivering a one-of-a-kind experience. Whether on the festival stage, in concert halls, or at private events, Skynyrd Nation guarantees a performance that will leave your audience wanting more. Blending heartfelt storytelling with the timeless spirit of 80s and 90s country, Christopher Scott delivers melodic songs that connect with audiences and keep them singing along. events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

Every Wednesday, we’re opening the stage to musicians of all kinds—bring your axe, your voice, your full band, or just the urge to play. When you arrive, find Melissa to sign up and lock in your spot. High-Hand’s pro backline will be ready for you. Solo players will be paired up into spontaneous jam groups, and together you’ll decide what to play—keeping it loose, creative, and fun. It’s all about rocking out, connecting with fellow musicians, and celebrating the amazing music community we’re surrounded by. Each week will also feature a guest band to keep the night energized and inspiring. Come jam, hang out, and make your Wednesday groove. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Petty Jack Flash
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Petty Jack Flash. Get ready to rock out as they bring the best of Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers, along with the timeless classics of the Rolling Stones, to the stage! This dynamic band faithfully recreates the iconic tunes of both legendary groups, delivering an electrifying concert experience that will have you singing along all night long. From the infectious melodies of Tom Petty to the raw energy of the Rolling Stones, Petty Jack Flash brings the spirit of rock ‘n’ roll to life with their full-throttle performances. Don’t miss your chance to experience the magic of these two powerhouse bands in one unforgettable show! You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Total Recall
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Total Recall. Hailing from Sacramento, CA, Total Recall provides an authentic experience of 90’s alternative rock. Their performance will transport you back to the golden era of bands like Weezer, Foo Fighters, Third Eye Blind, and many more. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Journey’s Edge
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Journey’s Edge. Hailing from Northern California, Journey’s Edge brings you an unparalleled tribute to the iconic sounds of Journey! Transport yourself back to the vibrant 80s with each electrifying performance, capturing the essence of that unique era through the band’s exceptional sound, authentic appearance, and captivating stage presence. Immerse yourself in the nostalgia of Journey’s greatest hits and relive the magic of a bygone era. Don’t miss the next Journey’s Edge concert – an unforgettable homage to one of the greatest rock bands of all time! You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Incognito
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Incognito. Step into a time machine of sound and sensation as Incognito whisks you away on a thrilling musical journey through the unforgettable hits of the ’70s, ’80s, and ’90s. Their electrifying performance promises to reignite your passion for classic rock, delivering a high-octane fusion of iconic anthems and chart-topping favorites. Join us for a musical experience like no other, where every riff, every beat, and every note is a testament to the timeless magic of rock music. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their Facebook page. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: Junior Cubs Program
events.description: Nature program for ages 3-6. Includes story and craft. Held at Murphy House (501 El Dorado Street, Auburn). Free program, no RSVP required.

events.title: On Stage with Def Lepp – A Tribute to Def Leppard
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Def Lepp. They are a premier Def Leppard tribute band bringing the sound, style, and swagger of one of rock’s most iconic acts to the stage. Known for their high-energy performances, they keep crowds on their feet with a full-scale production featuring lasers, fog, and dynamic lighting. Regularly appearing at venues and events across Northern California, Def Lepp delivers a hit-packed set of ‘80s arena rock favorites—capturing the spirit and excitement of a true Def Leppard concert experience. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with The Used Cars
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by The Used Cars. Step into a nostalgic journey through the iconic sounds of the 80s new wave synth-pop era with The Used Cars. Keeping the spirit of The Cars alive, this dynamic band faithfully delivers all the hits from the 1978 eponymous album to the 1984 release of Heartbeat City. With dual lead singers expertly channeling the essence of Ric Ocasek and Benjamin Orr, The Used Cars create an authentic experience that might make you believe you’re listening to the original legends. Their genuine passion for the music propels them to infuse an extra dose of magic into every performance, ensuring a night on the dance floor that’s exactly what you’ve been craving. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

Every Wednesday, we’re opening the stage to musicians of all kinds—bring your axe, your voice, your full band, or just the urge to play. When you arrive, find Melissa to sign up and lock in your spot. High-Hand’s pro backline will be ready for you. Solo players will be paired up into spontaneous jam groups, and together you’ll decide what to play—keeping it loose, creative, and fun. It’s all about rocking out, connecting with fellow musicians, and celebrating the amazing music community we’re surrounded by. Each week will also feature a guest band to keep the night energized and inspiring. Come jam, hang out, and make your Wednesday groove. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.
